creator: mstudioserver@gmail.com
text:
Xjadeo is a software video player that displays a video-clip in sync with an
 external time source (MTC, LTC, JACK-transport).
Xjadeo is useful in soundtrack composition, video monitoring or any task tha
t requires to synchronizing movie frames with audio events.
Xjadeo supports a multitude of video file formats, display libraries and syn
c sources. It includes an optional GUI called qjadeo that provides setup opt
ions, file history, video import/transcoding and control of Xjadeo's run-tim
e parameters.

WWW: http://xjadeo.sourceforge.net/
